feature: Populate calculated pitcher game lines in classic PDF columns
rule_cases: Recorded outs convert to baseball innings-pitched notation
Hits allowed are assigned to the pitcher of record for the play
Walks include regular and intentional bases on balls
Strikeouts and hit batters populate the correct PDF columns
Inherited runners remain charged to the pitcher responsible for putting them on base
Reached-on-error and catcher-interference runners are treated as unearned
validation: Dedicated Version 32 PDF pitching-stat population test
Version 32 browser and installed-app cache refresh test
